messages.content: Show me design specs authored today.
Which incident reports were filed yesterday?
Pull up the code reviews posted this week.
I'm reviewing our quarterly filings.
Sure — they're organized by submission date in the regulatory portal.
Show me the ones filed last week.
Contracts drafted last month.
What court decisions were issued last year?
Lab results from the past 7 days.
Patient records updated in the past 30 days.
Show me recent SRE incident reports.
Legal briefs submitted since January 1, 2026.
Invoices issued before March 2026.
Audit logs recorded in 2024.
Slide decks produced in February.
Show me audit logs from last year except March.
Design specs authored on January 15, 2026.
Hi, I'm on SRE triage rotation this morning.
Sure — I can help. Which service are you looking into?
Checkout has been flaky in production.
Got it. I can pull relevant incident reports for you.
Show me the ones filed yesterday.
Emails written last month from the Paris and Berlin offices.
Commits pushed since last Monday.
I'm reviewing our Q1 financial filings.
Sure — those are from our Q1 2026 reporting cycle.
Are they all in the portal?
Yes, every Q1 filing has been uploaded.
Show me only the ones submitted last week.
Latest safety bulletins.
Give me the Q3 2024 revenue report.
What is the 2025 strategic roadmap?
What is the standard onboarding procedure for new engineers?
Hello!
Thanks, that's very helpful.
Can you help me understand the 2008 financial crisis?
Sure — which aspect interests you?
The role of subprime mortgages.
Subprime mortgages were high-risk loans that were packaged and resold as securities, which amplified losses when borrowers defaulted.
Thanks. And what about the 2020 economic downturn?
What was the carbon tax rate in France in 2024?
Summarize trends in AI research from 2020 to 2025.
What are the key clauses in the 2023 French labor reform?
What were the findings in the 2024 annual sustainability report?
What's the current minimum wage in Germany?
Explain how OAuth 2.0 works.
Give me a summary of the Paris Olympics 2024.
What are the effects of climate change on Arctic sea ice between 2010 and 2020?
What happened in the 2016 US presidential election?
What are the side effects of ibuprofen?
Compare the main feature differences between Python 3.11 and 3.12.
What was the outcome of the Nuremberg trials?
How do I reset my password on the corporate VPN?
What are best practices for REST API versioning?
